title: pergularia brunoniana
intro: Pergularia brunoniana, also known as Satavar or Asan by locals, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pergularia brunoniana include the treatment of menstrual disorders, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. Herbal preparations of Pergularia brunoniana can be made by using its roots and leaves to create decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form.
